name: Dilled Garden Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container, combine the cottage cheese and lemon juice.
2. Cover; blend for 3 to 5 minutes at medium speed or until smooth.
3. Stir in the shredded carrot, sliced green onions, chopped parsley, chopped fresh dill (or dill weed), and pepper.
4. Garnish as desired.
5. Serve with cut-up fresh vegetables for dipping.
Makes 1 1/2 cups.
TIP: The mixture can also be used as a topping for baked potatoes.
